L&T secures ₹4,500 cr K9 Vajra follow-on order

By IDRW News Network · 28 June 2026

The Ministry of Defence has awarded Larsen & Toubro (L&T) a follow-on contract worth ₹4,500 cr for the supply of 100 K9 Vajra-T 155mm self-propelled howitzers to the Indian Army. The deal was signed on 27 June 2026 and builds on the original 100-gun order delivered earlier.

The K9 Vajra-T, produced by L&T at its Hazira facility under a technology partnership with Hanwha Aerospace of South Korea, is a 155mm/52-calibre self-propelled howitzer. L&T Defence said the new order strengthens its position in the Indian artillery segment.

Officials said deliveries would be completed over 42 months. The contract win is among the largest artillery orders placed with a private Indian firm.
